name: Lock Vault
description: Immediately lock the encrypted vault (gocryptfs)

name: Unlock Vault
description: Mount the encrypted vault (prompts for passphrase)

name: Start Gaming Mode
description: Activate gaming profile (GameMode + MangoHud + relaxed firewall)

name: Stop Gaming Mode
description: Deactivate gaming profile and restore strict firewall

name: Reload Firewall
description: Reload nftables rules from disk (hisnos_egress table)

name: Start Kali Lab
description: Start Kali Linux Distrobox container for security research

name: Stop Lab
description: Stop all running lab containers

name: System Mode: Normal
description: Switch to normal workstation mode

name: System Mode: Safe
description: Enter safe mode (vault locked, strict firewall)

name: Check Threat Status
description: Show current risk score and active threat signals

name: Open Dashboard
description: Open the HisnOS governance dashboard in browser

name: View Audit Log
description: Show recent audit events from the audit pipeline

name: View Threat Timeline
description: Show recent threat scoring events

name: Run Stress Tests
description: Run all HisnOS validation stress test suites

name: Update Firewall CIDRs
description: Refresh IP allowlists for egress firewall rules

name: Vault Status
description: Check vault mount state and idle timer

name: Rotate Vault Key
description: Rotate gocryptfs master key (vault must be mounted)

name: hisnosd Health
description: Check hisnosd daemon health and connected subsystems

name: Firewall Status
description: Check nftables hisnos_egress table and rule count
action: shell:nft list table inet hisnos_egress 2>/dev/null | head -40

name: Open Terminal
description: Launch Konsole terminal emulator
